properties.name: Kuban Host Territory
properties.polygon_basis: Approximate boundary of the Kuban Cossack Host territory as of 1917. Southern boundary follows the crest of the Western Caucasus; western boundary is the Sea of Azov and Black Sea coast; northern boundary (separating from the Don Host) ran roughly along the Yeya River; eastern boundary abutted the Terek Host near Stavropol. Shape is a simplified hand-drawn approximation, not a survey-grade boundary.
